allow: Bash(sed -i "s|import { File, Paths } from ''expo-file-system'';|import { File, Paths, Directory } from ''expo-file-system'';|" src/screens/SettingsScreen.tsx)
Bash(sed -i "/import \\* as Sharing from ''expo-sharing'';/a import * as DocumentPicker from ''expo-document-picker'';" src/screens/SettingsScreen.tsx)
Bash(sed -i 's|<View style={styles.tabIconContainer}>|<View style={styles.tabIconContainer} accessibilityLabel={label} accessibilityRole=""tab"">|' App.tsx)
Bash(sed -i 's|<View style={styles.scanTabContainer}>|<View style={styles.scanTabContainer} accessibilityLabel=""Scan"" accessibilityRole=""tab"">|' App.tsx)

Bash(sed -i "s|<TouchableOpacity style={styles.waterBtn} hitSlop={{ top: 6, bottom: 6, left: 6, right: 6 }} onPress={async \(\) => { bounceWater\(\); Haptics.impactAsync\(Haptics.ImpactFeedbackStyle.Light\); await logWater\(250\); await loadData\(\); }}>|<TouchableOpacity style={styles.waterBtn} hitSlop={{ top: 6, bottom: 6, left: 6, right: 6 }} onPress={async \(\) => { bounceWater\(\); Haptics.impactAsync\(Haptics.ImpactFeedbackStyle.Light\); await logWater\(250\); await loadData\(\); }} accessibilityLabel=""Add 250 milliliters of water"" accessibilityRole=""button"">|" src/screens/DashboardScreen.tsx)

Bash(sed -i "s|<TouchableOpacity style={styles.waterBtn} hitSlop={{ top: 6, bottom: 6, left: 6, right: 6 }} onPress={async \(\) => { bounceWater\(\); Haptics.impactAsync\(Haptics.ImpactFeedbackStyle.Light\); await logWater\(500\); await loadData\(\); }}>|<TouchableOpacity style={styles.waterBtn} hitSlop={{ top: 6, bottom: 6, left: 6, right: 6 }} onPress={async \(\) => { bounceWater\(\); Haptics.impactAsync\(Haptics.ImpactFeedbackStyle.Light\); await logWater\(500\); await loadData\(\); }} accessibilityLabel=""Add 500 milliliters of water"" accessibilityRole=""button"">|" src/screens/DashboardScreen.tsx)

Bash(sed -i 's|<TouchableOpacity style={styles.galleryBtn} onPress={handlePickImage}>|<TouchableOpacity style={styles.galleryBtn} onPress={handlePickImage} accessibilityLabel=""Pick from gallery"" accessibilityRole=""button"">|' src/screens/ScanScreen.tsx)

Bash(sed -i "s|<TouchableOpacity style={styles.galleryBtn} onPress={\(\) => setShowManualInput\(true\)}>|<TouchableOpacity style={styles.galleryBtn} onPress={\(\) => setShowManualInput\(true\)} accessibilityLabel=""Manual food entry"" accessibilityRole=""button"">|" src/screens/ScanScreen.tsx)

Bash(sed -i "s|onPress={\(\) => setScanMode\(''photo''\)}|onPress={\(\) => setScanMode\(''photo''\)}\\n                accessibilityLabel=""Photo scan mode"" accessibilityRole=""button""|" src/screens/ScanScreen.tsx)

Bash(sed -i "s|onPress={\(\) => { setScanMode\(''barcode''\); setBarcodeScanned\(false\); }}|onPress={\(\) => { setScanMode\(''barcode''\); setBarcodeScanned\(false\); }}\\n                accessibilityLabel=""Barcode scan mode"" accessibilityRole=""button""|" src/screens/ScanScreen.tsx)

Bash(sed -i 's|<TouchableOpacity style={styles.editBtn} onPress={onEdit} hitSlop={{ top: 10, bottom: 10, left: 10, right: 10 }}>|<TouchableOpacity style={styles.editBtn} onPress={onEdit} hitSlop={{ top: 10, bottom: 10, left: 10, right: 10 }} accessibilityLabel=""Edit meal"" accessibilityRole=""button"">|' src/components/MealCard.tsx)

Bash(sed -i 's|<TouchableOpacity style={styles.deleteBtn} onPress={onDelete} hitSlop={{ top: 10, bottom: 10, left: 10, right: 10 }}>|<TouchableOpacity style={styles.deleteBtn} onPress={onDelete} hitSlop={{ top: 10, bottom: 10, left: 10, right: 10 }} accessibilityLabel=""Delete meal"" accessibilityRole=""button"">|' src/components/MealCard.tsx)

Bash(sed -i 's|<TouchableOpacity style={styles.saveBtn} onPress={onSave}>|<TouchableOpacity style={styles.saveBtn} onPress={onSave} accessibilityLabel=""Log this meal"" accessibilityRole=""button"">|' src/components/AnalysisOverlay.tsx)
